text.title: UI Component Library Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of UI Component Library. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Library Button has only `default` story; loading + disabled + error states broken in prod.
antipattern.fix: Add stories covering all states; visual regression baseline against each.

antipattern.symptom: Library passes manual review; deploy fails WCAG audit on contrast + role.
antipattern.fix: Wire @storybook/addon-a11y + axe-core; gate merge on violations.

antipattern.symptom: Token change in `--primary` accidentally flips Button text colour; nobody noticed for two weeks.
antipattern.fix: Wire visual regression tool; block merge on un-reviewed diff.

antipattern.symptom: v1.4.0 introduces breaking change; consumers break on `npm update`.
antipattern.fix: Adopt changesets / release-please; CHANGELOG.md entry per change; major bump for breaking.
